sql_array: CREATE TABLE Persons (firstName STRING, lastName STRING, ageInYears INT, weightInLbs FLOAT, heightInInches FLOAT);
INSERT INTO Persons VALUES ('Jane', NULL, 25, NULL, NULL);

DB.DBA.soap_dt_define ('PERSON', '<complexType name="PERSON"><sequence><element name="firstName" type="string"/><element name="lastName" type="string"/><element name="ageInYears" type="int"/><element name="weightInLbs" type="float"/><element name="heightInInches" type="float"/></sequence></complexType>');
SELECT firstName, lastName, ageInYears - NULL AS ageDifference FROM Persons;
SELECT AVG(weightInLbs) AS avgWeight FROM Persons GROUP BY firstName HAVING avgWeight > 150;
SELECT SUM(dataValue) AS totalWeight, COUNT(dataValue) AS itemCount FROM TempData;
SELECT personData, CAST((ageInYears - 10) AS STRING) AS ageAfterReduction FROM Persons WHERE ageInYears IS NOT NULL;
SELECT p.firstName, p.lastName FROM Persons p JOIN TempData t ON p.weightInLbs = t.dataValue - 0.5;

DB.DBA.soap_dt_define ('ArrayOfPERSON', '<complexType name="ArrayOfPERSON"><complexContent><restriction base="enc:Array"><sequence><element name="item" type="tns:PERSON" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" nillable="true"/></sequence><attributeGroup ref="enc:commonAttributes"/><attribute ref="enc:offset"/><attribute ref="enc:arrayType" wsdl:arrayType="tns:PERSON[]"/></restriction></complexContent></complexType>');
SELECT DISTINCT firstName, ROUND(AVG(weightInLbs) - (SELECT AVG(weightInLbs) FROM Persons WHERE weightInLbs IS NOT NULL), 2) AS avgDiff FROM Persons GROUP BY firstName;
SELECT p.firstName, p.lastName, p.ageInYears FROM Persons p WHERE p.ageInYears IS NOT NULL AND p.ageInYears - 5 >= 18;
SELECT (NULL + 5) AS nullTest, (5.0 - (SELECT MAX(weightInLbs) FROM Persons WHERE weightInLbs IS NOT NULL)) AS weightTest;
